title: The Sega (Kosol's Dream Teachers)
summary: The conical-helmeted beings Kosol Ouch says trained him across a 32-year dream at Angkor Wat — the origin of his mission and his devices.
markdown:
**The Sega** — also called the **Esiad** — are, in [Kosol Ouch's](/lore/kosol-ouch/) own
account, the beings who set his whole path in motion. He describes them in the August 10, 2020
session: at Angkor Wat in the year 2000, on his honeymoon, he fell asleep in the temple's heat
and entered what he calls a "daydream" that lasted **thirty-two years** while only twenty
minutes passed in this world.

In that dreamworld, he says, *"I received the training & knowledge from the people… I call
them the Sega (or Esiad.) And they were black, but they dressed in spacesuit-types with
conical helmets, like the people from the 3D Hieroglyphics… in the Khmer tradition and Angkor
Wat Temple."* They trained him, by his telling, *"in all kinds of technologies: in Spiritual
technologies, and Quantum technology, and Consciousness training"* — before placing him in *"a
Crystal Coffin, like a tomb,"* where a computer voice announced he was being sent back. He adds
one disarming detail: among them he *"saw Captain Picard,"* and *"Patrick was the leader of that
particular world."*

Whatever one makes of it, this is the founding story the archive rests on: Kosol says he woke
with *"an injunction to build this stuff"* he had seen — the seashell-and-metal
[Source-Coil Device](/lore/source-coil-device/) that channels the sessions, the
consciousness-run craft, the books, and the practice he would name [Baramay](/lore/baramay/).
The Sega are the archive's first cause in its own words — the teachers behind the teacher,
recorded as he tells it.
